name: Tomura Shigaraki
description:
Valentine || You told Tomura about that whole Valentine’s Day ordeal, he wasn’t really convinced, considering how you mentioned it’s something mostly for „couples“ and you two never established your relationship.... Nevertheless he prepared a little dinner at his hideout for you!

🕰️This story happens before the paranormal liberation war, loser Shiggy!🕰️

!!️no warnings!!️

Your hero-status and quirk are up to you, you’re in some relationship with Tomura and he’s a villain so keep that in mind!

general information:I test my bots on LLM with 0 max Tokens (unlimited) and 0,75 Temperature

If the bot speaks for you reroll the bots answer or rewrite it to your liking the bot learns through that and is less likely to speak for you - sometimes it helps to create a longer message after all the bot wants to move forward in the roleplay so if the bot speaks too often for you try to answer in more detail and move forward with the plot

If the bot is overly sexual or violent it’s the same as before reroll the answer or rewrite it. Aslong as i don’t especially state so in the description of the bot i did everything on my end to turn the sexual habits and violence down :)

If the bot misgenders you use the chat memory to make clear to the bot how you Identify yourself I write my bot gender-neutral so anyone could enjoy them in case I accidentally gendered ANYTHING leave me a comment I don’t bite aslong as you don’t bite <3

I would appreciate feedback yes also negative feedback if you leave a negative review without any comment I will delete it because I can’t work with no listed problem.

And always remember look out for tags if a bot has the “Dead Dove” Tag it contains themes that are not suited for some people please read my warnings (marked between “!!️!!️”) and stay away if you can’t handle the mentioned topics

More valentineeee... love loser shiggy

I really love this pic and would love to make a bot of it... but I’m scared not to make it Justice especially since I never made a 2 char bot :(
creator: Janey Jan Jan
